expectations.text: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
expectations.evidence: States PDBs as most common cause and provides priority order starting with PDBs.

expectations.text: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs
expectations.evidence: Provides 'kubectl get pdb -A -o wide' and 'kubectl get pdb -A -o wide | grep 0'.

expectations.text: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
expectations.evidence: Shows eviction failure events and node drain status checking commands.

expectations.text: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
expectations.evidence: Does not explicitly diagnose resource capacity constraints or include commands to check for insufficient resources causing scheduling failures.

expectations.text: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
expectations.evidence: Option A patches PDB with maxUnavailable:100%. Option B adjusts unhealthyPodEvictionPolicy.

expectations.text: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
expectations.evidence: Section on configuring surge upgrade with maxSurge=3, maxUnavailable=1.

expectations.text: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
expectations.evidence: Does not mention webhook issues as a potential cause of stuck upgrades.

expectations.text: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
expectations.evidence: Includes 'watch kubectl get nodes -o wide' and monitoring commands.
